slides.body: A Carnegie Mellon and Anaxi study explores how AI systems rely on vast training data. The research aims to clarify data value and revenue models for reusable AI components, addressing challenges in the internet economy's advertising model.
slides.visual_direction: Minimalist design, black text on white background. Left-aligned body. Blue accent for headline.
slides.source_topic_headline: Anaxi, Carnegie Mellon study AI data value, revenue models

slides.body: A TechRadar report suggests treating AI agents as junior engineers. This approach ensures safer and more productive use, acknowledging their capabilities while mitigating risks from inconsistent results due to probabilistic machine learning models.
slides.visual_direction: Minimalist design, black text on white background. Left-aligned body. Blue accent for headline.
slides.source_topic_headline: Treating AI Agents as Junior Engineers: Oversight for Productivity and Safety
